promptContext: You are translating the documentation website for the MT Eval Arena, an open benchmarking platform for machine-translation methods (part of the Champollion project). Audience: developers, researchers, and translators. Professional technical register. Preserve ALL markdown/MDX formatting, links, admonitions, tables, code blocks, CLI commands, metric names (chrF++, BLEU, COMET, composite score), config keys, and URLs exactly as-is. Keep proper nouns and metric names in English. Statistical terminology (confidence interval, bootstrap, significance) must be translated with the standard academic term in the target language.

zh.register: Professional Simplified Chinese (简体中文). Modern technical documentation register. Use established Chinese technical terms (批处理, 缓存, 插件) but keep proper nouns and metric names in English. Developer/researcher-facing — assume the reader writes code.

Statistically tied with top scorer google/gemini-3.1-pro-preview (composite 0.602); chosen on cost. Selected 2026-06-12 per docs/dogfood/DOGFOOD_PLAN.md §4 (highest composite; paired-bootstrap ties -> cheaper).
